Actions.Text: REFERRED TO INVESTIGATIONS AND GOVERNMENT OPERATIONS

Title: Authorizes the compensation of Catholic Guardian Services for fair and equitable holding expenses associated with lands transferred to Catholic Home Bureau
Summary: Authorizes the compensation to Catholic Guardian Services for fair and equitable holding expenses associated with lands transferred to Catholic Home Bureau which reverted to the state upon termination of their use for public purposes.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to authorizing the commissioner of general services provide compensation to Catholic Guardian Services for certain expenses in connection with holding property for the purposes of providing housing and shelter for homeless, destitute, refugee, delinquent and/or disabled persons in New York city
